_comment: Template for config/review-owners.json (which is git-ignored — it holds your personal list). Copy this file to config/review-owners.json and add the GitHub owners the one-click PR review launcher may clone from, e.g. ["WTS-Paradigm", "your-personal-account"]. Owners are matched case-insensitively. The launcher fails closed: an empty list (like this template) refuses every review until you populate it.
